case_title: MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' VS. SABINA SHNAPEK

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR CAUDLE, TREVOR AS ATTORNEY FOR SHNAPEK, SABINA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION SERVED JUN-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-07-2013. OCT-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR MARTIN LEE FINEMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-22-2013 THROUGH APR-22-2013.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2012

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA $17,849.58 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,849.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR FINEMAN, MARTIN LEE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHNAPEK, SABINA
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-17-2013.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT A. HAWLEY.
